messages.content:
Which aspect is NOT the most important for Conservation Biology Approaches?
Group of answer choices

Political

Sociological

Ecological

Economical
Economical.

Which aspect is NOT the most important for Conservation Biology Approaches?
Group of answer choices

Political

Sociological

Ecological

Economical
Economical.

Which statement is NOT true for the Conservation Prioritization (CP)?
Group of answer choices

CP is a method for decision making

CP can give the best approach for management

CP can forecast the long-term results

CP is a method used for ecosystem at risk
All of the statements are true for Conservation Prioritization (CP).

Which statement is NOT true for the Conservation Prioritization (CP)?
Group of answer choices

CP is a method for decision making

CP can give the best approach for management

CP can forecast the long-term results

CP is a method used for ecosystem at risk
All of the statements are true for Conservation Prioritization (CP).

Considering the data input of GIS, fill in the following blanks.

The system of earth-orbiting satellites which can provide the precise location of an object is called 
 .

The use of aircraft or satellites to capture information about Earth's surface is called 
 .

The data collected manually via people is the method of

The system of earth-orbiting satellites which can provide the precise location of an object is called GPS (Global Positioning System).

The use of aircraft or satellites to capture information about Earth's surface is called Remote Sensing.

The data collected manually via people is the method of Ground Truthing.
The data collected manually via people is the method of
Ground Truthing.

Which of the following statement is correct?
Group of answer choices

GIS allows for the analysis of GPS and remote sensing data, but not the storage of them.

GIS provides methods to manipulate data in a cell individually or based on the attributes of neighboring cells.

All options are correct.

Compared to GPS and Remote Sensing, field survey can be unnecessary and ineffective.

GIS can help analyze forest inventory and forest health, but not stand-level forest structures.

Non-spatial information is unnecessary in GIS analysis.
GIS provides methods to manipulate data in a cell individually or based on the attributes of neighboring cells.

Which of the following statement is true?
Group of answer choices

Both harvest modelling and yield predictions rely on the model of SIMFOR.

None is correct.

All GIS models are wrong due to their simple representations of the reality.

GIS cannot determine the operability of a forest stand due to its complexity.

The suitability of a habitat can be informed by the 3D driver simulation.

No GIS model can help the studies of genetic diversity.

Hydrological analysis need the FORCAST model to evaluate streams and buffers.
The suitability of a habitat can be informed by the 3D driver simulation.

Which statement is NOT correct for seedling production?
Group of answer choices

Random single sowing has a lower culling rate than that of family block

All options are correct.

Germination speed will influence the quality of growth

Culling can help to select the best performer

Single sowing is not recommended for nursery
All options are correct.

Which statement is NOT correct for seedling production?
Group of answer choices

Random single sowing has a lower culling rate than that of family block

All options are correct.

Germination speed will influence the quality of growth

Culling can help to select the best performer

Single sowing is not recommended for nursery
All options are correct.

__________ is the change in leaf color
Group of answer choices

Chlorosis

Hypertrophy

Pigmentation

Resinosis

Necrosis
Chlorosis.

Which statement is NOT true for a healthy forest?
Group of answer choices

Human can impact the forest health by bringing exotic pathogens

The special scale can influence the evaluation criteria

Canker disease often happens in the old trees

There are different criteria from different aspect

None is correct.
None is correct.
